---
title: "Home"
---

# Nicolás A. Lillo Bustos

Applied microeconomist based in Chile.

My work focuses on productivity, industrial policy, firm dynamics, natural-resource economics, and empirical policy analysis.

## Research interests

- Productivity and misallocation
- Industrial policy
- Firm dynamics
- Fisheries and natural-resource economics
- Survey and administrative data

## Welcome

This website will host information about my research, projects, and professional work.
